note: The report references CENTCOM destroying 16 Iranian minelayers near the Strait of Hormuz on March 10 (footnote [lv]: https://x.com/CENTCOM/status/2031489675760640370). This event date is 2026-03-10, which falls within the already-logged range (up to 2026-03-15). It is unclear whether a prior event for this specific action was logged; if not, it should be added as a new event for 2026-03-10 targeting Iranian minelayers near the Strait of Hormuz.

raw.title: CENTCOM destroys 16 Iranian minelayers near Strait of Hormuz
raw.description: CENTCOM reported that US forces destroyed 16 Iranian minelayers near the Strait of Hormuz. Iran has deployed fewer than 10 naval mines in the strait so far; a 2025 US Congressional Report estimated Iran has 5,000–6,000 naval mines in total.
